scripts.mobile:add:android: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:add:ios: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add ios
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:sync:ios: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync:ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:apk:debug: npm run mobile:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
